chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-676 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3079/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders of CMA No.3080/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 14-5-2025 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that he will avail the remedy by approaching before the competent forum for redressal of his grievance. In view of above, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. However, the petitioner is at liberty to avail the appropriate remedy, available to him, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
